creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
This doesn't appear to have been committed.
As I am still getting messages from pkgfallout@
for errors involving the PREVIOUS version, eg;
package - main-i386-default][devel/safe-iop]
Failed for safe-iop-0.3.2 in check-sanity...

When will this commit hit the pkg builders | what
else must be done to make the change in this pr "stick"?

Thanks! :-)

--Chris
